monitoredArtifacts.title: Development Hub PDX FAQ
monitoredArtifacts.recrawlReason: DevHub public guidance can change when online permit request, correction upload, inspection, or payment guidance changes.
monitoredArtifacts.storedEvidencePolicy: Store manifest fields, hashes, headers, timestamps, and source URLs only; do not store raw HTML in this fixture.

monitoredArtifacts.title: Permit application form artifact referenced from public PP&D forms guidance
monitoredArtifacts.recrawlReason: Form and PDF artifacts are expected to change less often than public guidance pages, but should be refreshed when their index page changes.
monitoredArtifacts.storedEvidencePolicy: Store link metadata and planned hash/header field names only; do not download or commit the PDF or form document.

changeReportCategories.description: Permit request type appears, disappears, or is renamed in public PP&D or DevHub guidance.
Required forms, plans, calculations, signatures, file standards, or supporting documents change.
Deadline, expiration, reactivation, extension, or timing guidance changes.
Fee, payment timing, payment method, or payment workflow guidance changes.
Public guidance for authenticated DevHub actions such as correction upload, inspection scheduling, or permit requests changes.
